response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with strong recent alignment to the role's stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators. Demonstrates craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and end-to-end ownership across web, mobile, and embedded, matching the senior IC profile well.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB experience at Optilyz and re:cinq
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work matches required AI skill
Long track record of craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older (robotics/LabWindows era)
Cloud experience skewed to AWS CDK; limited GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown
